info.title: Marathon API Documentation
info.description: This is the API documentation for Marathon application.

example.error: Validation error: Params: "name" cannot be empty

UnauthorizedError.description: Missing or invalid Firebase bearer token

ForbiddenError.description: Authenticated user does not have the required role

hasRole.description: The roles that are allowed to access the route.

allowSameUser.description: Allows a user to access their own resource even if they do not have one of the required roles.

lore.description: The lore and background of the faction

status.description: The HTTP status code of the server

uptime.description: The number of seconds the server has been running

timestamp.description: The ISO timestamp of when the health check was performed

version.description: The current version of the API

uid.description: The Firebase user ID of the user receiving the custom claims.

prime.description: The primary ability of the shell

tactical.description: The tactical ability of the shell

trait_1.description: The first passive trait of the shell

trait_2.description: The second passive trait of the shell

heat_capacity.description: The heat capacity stat of the shell

agility.description: The agility stat of the shell

loot_speed.description: The looting speed stat of the shell

melee_damage.description: The melee damage stat of the shell

prime_recovery.description: The recovery rate of the prime ability

tactical_recovery.description: The recovery rate of the tactical ability

self_repair_speed.description: The self repair speed stat of the shell
